administrative.description: The root key with administrative privileges for system management.

assertionMethod.description: A key used to make assertions and verify claims within the system.

authentication.description: A key used for entity authentication and identity verification.

capabilityDelegation.description: A key used to delegate capabilities or permissions to other entities.

capabilityInvocation.description: A key used to invoke capabilities or permissions within the system.

CosmosAccountAddress.description: A blockchain account address within the Cosmos ecosystem for verification purposes.

digitalSignature.description: The default key used for digital signatures and message verification.

EcdsaSecp256k1VerificationKey2019.description: A verification key using ECDSA with the secp256k1 curve, commonly used in blockchain systems.

keyAgreement.description: A key used for encryption and secure communication between parties.

operational.description: A rotating key used for regular operational activities.

userPersonal.description: A personal key assigned to end-users for their individual operations.

Authentication.description: Mechanism to verify the identity of the DID subject.

Assertion.description: Enables making verifiable claims about the DID subject.

KeyAgreement.description: Facilitates secure communication by deriving shared secrets.

CapabilityInvocation.description: Allows the DID subject to invoke capabilities associated with the DID.

CapabilityDelegation.description: Permits the DID subject to delegate capabilities to another party.
